name: Pipestone Indoor Country Club
about: Pipestone Indoor Country Club is a dual-venue facility featuring an 18-hole outdoor golf course in Eau Claire, Michigan, and a state-of-the-art indoor simulator facility in Benton Harbor. The indoor operation is powered by Golfzon simulators, which are known for their high accuracy and true ball flight simulation. The venue caters to a wide range of golfers, from those looking to play in any weather to serious players seeking practice, fitting services, and competitive play. It offers a comprehensive golfing experience with services including club fittings, repairs, and personalized lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Extremely accurate simulation of shots on world-renowned golf courses
Clean and private rooms for an undistracted experience
Comprehensive suite of club services including fittings and repairs

food_and_drink.notes: Available for events; Google reviews mention 'excellent food'
No specific information on an alcohol bar provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Large projection screen with driving greens

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs; the venue also offers club rentals and services for grips and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food service is available for events. Information on bringing outside food or drink is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard time for 18 holes on a golf course; indoor simulator time varies by group and booking.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not have specific information listed regarding child-friendly features or activities.
